name: python3-pyfatfs
title: python3-pyfatfs
summary: filesystem module for use with PyFilesystem2 (Python 3)
description:
filesystem module for use with PyFilesystem2 (Python 3)
This package contains a filesystem module for use with PyFilesystem2 for
anyone who needs to access or modify files on a FAT filesystem. It also
provides a low-level API that allows direct interaction with a FAT filesystem
without PyFilesystem2 abstraction.
.
pyfatfs supports FAT12/FAT16/FAT32 as well as the VFAT extension (long file
names).
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyfatfs because filesystem module for use with PyFilesystem2 (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyfatfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyfatfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyfatfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
